generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former FEMA regional director, I've seen firsthand how vital local preparedness is for national security. Communities that invest in civil defense aren't just protecting themselves - they're reducing the burden on our overstretched military. Studies show prepared neighborhoods respond 40% faster to emergencies, giving first responders crucial time. This isn't about fear - it's about responsible citizenship. #CommunityResilience #NationalSecurity
